rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Modify Petitioner/Respondent Michael Lynne Glassman'S Notice To Appear And Produce At Trial And Supplemental Notice To Appear And Produce At Trial Served On Respondent/Petitioner Andria Glassman; Memorandum In Support; And Declaration Of Kathryn M. Murphy
rulings.Rulings: Motion denied. CCP 1987(c) provides that a party may serve a notice to produce documents on the opposing party and further provides that the person upon whom the request is made may serve written objections. Thereafter, upon noticed motion of the requesting party the court may order production of items. Thus, responding party's objections are preserved unless and until the requesting party files and serves a noticed motion. Any party who wishes to contest this tentative ruling must notify the court (at 415-551-3702) and opposing counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on 5/3/12. IN THE EVENT A HEARING IS REQUIRED THE MATTER WILL BE HEARD AT 10:00 A.M. ON 5/4/12 RATHER THAN 9:30 A.M.
